channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 8–13 July 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Italia Viva (RE): 0 seats
  • Più Europa (RE): 0 seats
  • Partito Socialista Italiano (S&D): 0 seats
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 20–25 seats
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0–1 seats
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 16–21 seats
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 10–13 seats
  • Futuro Nazionale (ESN): 4–6 seats
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 4–7 seats
  • Azione (RE): 0–4 seats
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4–7 seats
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1–3 seats
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2–6 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 8–13 July 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
item.description: TBD

item.title: Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 8–13 July 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0.6–1.8%
  • Italia Viva (RE): 1.8–3.6%
  • Più Europa (RE): 0.8–2.2%
  • Partito Socialista Italiano (S&D): 0.6–1.8%
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 24.7–29.8%
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0.3–1.2%
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 19.1–23.7%
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 11.1–14.9%
  • Futuro Nazionale (ESN): 5.1–7.9%
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 6.3–9.3%
  • Azione (RE): 2.6–4.7%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4.3–6.9%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.6–3.4%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.6–4.7%
